case_title: LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY DE vs. ATTARD, JANET et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY DE AS TO DEFENDANT ATTARD, JANET DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-14-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-12-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-25-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-14-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR DEC-29-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-29-1994, CONTINUED TO JUN-29-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR STATUS OF BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-29-1995, CONTINUED TO JAN-04-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-04-1996, CONTINUED TO MAR-04-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR FILING OF DISMISSAL OF BANKCRUPTCY STATUS REPORT BY 2/15/96. IF FILED, APPEARANCE WAIVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY FILED BY DEFENDANT ATTARD, JANET
